subject: [PATCH v8 03/15] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE accessors to uffd

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch renames kernel-internal functions and macros related to the uffd-wp PTE bit, which is used for userfaultfd write protection. The rename is mechanical and does not change behavior. The bit's meaning now depends on the VMA flag (WP or RWP), rather than its name. This change is part of a larger series of patches that reuses the uffd-wp PTE bit for access-tracking PTEs alongside write-protected ones.
